creator: antoine@FreeBSD.org
text:
Exp-run fails to start:

[00:00:36] Error: compute_deps_pkg failed to lookup pkgname for lang/python-pycache@py37 processing package python37-3.7.16_3 from lang/python37 -- Is SUBDIR+=python-pycache@py37 missing in lang/Makefile and does the port provide the 'py37' FLAVOR?
